task: Table Talk Diner drag serving and full-body sprites
requirements: Kitchen dish cards must not overlap each other.
Serving should require dragging a dish to the guest who ordered it.
Customer avatars should be replaced with full-body sprite-sheet characters suitable for semi-animation.
The waiter/player should use a full-body sprite-sheet character suitable for semi-animation.
Characters should have tile-based walk-in/walk-out and movement-to-seat behavior.
Verify build and desktop/mobile browser layout.
current_step: Implemented and verified. Build passes; desktop and mobile browser geometry show non-overlapping draggable dish cards, full-body sprite sheets, walk tiles, and inline food chips in guest speech bubbles.
